result.stdout:
Usage: efp generate -c ContosoUniversityContext -v -o Models

Commands:
  list:  Lists available DbContext types.
  generate:  Generate a set of "buddy class" for all entity types in a DbContext

commands.payload:
Usage: efp generate -c ContosoUniversityContext -v -o Models

Commands:
  list:  Lists available DbContext types.
  generate:  Generate a set of "buddy class" for all entity types in a DbContext

result.stdout:
Usage: efp generate [options] 

options:
  --output-dir | -o:  The directory to put partial class files in. Paths are relative to the project directory. [Default: Models]
  --project | -p:  Relative path to the project folder of the target project. Default value is the current folder.
  --context | -c:  The name of the DbContext class to generate.
  --force | -f:  Overwrite existing files.
  --verbose | -v:  Overwrite existing files.
